english_text:
SPIRITUAL WORLD — SPIRIT (روح)
PHYSICAL WORLD — MIND CONSCIOUSNESS (قلب | العقل, Intellect/Heart) — SOUL I/EGO (نفس)
alt_text: Two-tier diagram: top tier 'SPIRITUAL WORLD' contains a 'SPIRIT / روح' box. Bottom tier 'PHYSICAL WORLD' contains a yin-yang of 'قلب|العقل / Intellect | Heart' (MIND CONSCIOUSNESS) on the left and a multicolored profile-silhouette 'نفس / SOUL I/EGO' on the right.
notes: Anthropology diagram: roh (spirit) belongs to the spiritual world; qalb/aql (mind/heart) and nafs (ego/soul) belong to the physical world.
